items.question: What is Qoves?
items.answer: World's best platform to improve looks and achieve facial transformation without surgery, using a personalized facial analysis and transformation plan based on over 2,000 academic studies.

items.question: Who is this for?
items.answer: Anyone who wants to improve their looks with science-based methods, without surgery.

items.question: What exactly will I receive?
items.answer: Comprehensive facial analysis, personalized glow-up protocol, biometric scores, before-and-after visualizations, an aesthetic letter from the team, and messaging access to the care team. Updated annually.

items.question: Can't I just do this with ChatGPT or Claude?
items.answer: LLMs can only offer generic guidance; they cannot landmark a face, measure skin texture, or perform 100+ aesthetic tests. Qoves uses proprietary models built over years of research.

items.question: How long will it take to receive my results?
items.answer: Up to 28 days after uploading photos.

items.question: How does it work?
items.answer: 1. Provide demographics, lifestyle, and goals. 2. Upload 6 photo angles. 3. Receive your full protocol and visualizations within 28 days.

items.question: Is this a one-time report or a continuous service?
items.answer: Ongoing annual subscription, cancellable anytime, with unlimited messaging to the aesthetic team.

items.question: How often do I need to submit photos?
items.answer: Once a year.

items.question: What makes Qoves different from beauty apps or filters?
items.answer: Millimeter-accurate measurements, realistic non-surgical visualizations, and a recommendation engine using the latest research.

items.question: Can I really get results without surgery?
items.answer: Yes. Many small combined changes produce dramatic results without surgery.

items.question: What's included in the facial analysis?
items.answer: Symmetry, proportions, masculinity/femininity scoring, and a breakdown of each individual feature and how it affects overall aesthetics.

items.question: How accurate is your analysis?
items.answer: Measurements are accurate to the nearest millimeter, surpassing top aesthetic clinics.

items.question: Is this actually science-backed, or just AI hype?
items.answer: Grounded in 2,000+ peer-reviewed studies; would cost over $15,000 if done manually by experts.

items.question: Does it work for all ethnicities?
items.answer: Yes. Every test is adjusted for ethnicity, age, sex, and lifestyle.

items.question: How often can I get a new analysis?
items.answer: Once a year with new photos.

items.question: What is the protocol?
items.answer: A step-by-step glow-up plan with personalized, non-surgical recommendations and visual previews for each feature.

items.question: What's included in my protocol?
items.answer: Recommended improvements per feature, explanations, visualizations, multiple alternatives (products/exercises/treatments), step-by-step instructions, and an aesthetic letter.

items.question: Does the protocol really work?
items.answer: Yes. Expect real results within the first week; dramatic transformation within 4 months.

items.question: What kind of recommendations will I get?
items.answer: Product recommendations, skincare routines, hair advice, OTC products, makeup/styling, color/contrast advice, lifestyle changes, facial exercises, facial posture, supplements, at-home devices, in-clinic treatments, non-surgical injectables, dental aesthetics, facial expression control, and health screening.

items.question: Can I trust the recommendations?
items.answer: Yes. All are safe and clinically proven.

items.question: How long does it take to glow up?
items.answer: First week for initial results; 4 months for most users.

items.question: Are you going to push me to buy products or procedures?
items.answer: No. Both premium and budget-friendly options are offered; many recommendations are free.

items.question: Can I see what my face will look like?
items.answer: Yes. Realistic visualizations of all changes combined, plus individual previews per change.

items.question: What if I don't like the suggestions?
items.answer: You can follow only what you like and chat with the aesthetic team for alternatives.

items.question: How often can I get a new protocol?
items.answer: Once a year.

items.question: Are there any risks?
items.answer: Recommendations are safe and minimally invasive; checking with a doctor for treatments/procedures is advised.

items.question: Are the recommendations expensive?
items.answer: Multiple budget options are provided per recommendation. Attractiveness has documented financial and social benefits, so it can be viewed as an investment.

items.question: Do I have to follow everything perfectly for it to work?
items.answer: No. Following the majority is enough for dramatic results.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Sign up on the website, create an account, fill out the questionnaire, and upload photos. Results arrive within 28 days.

items.question: Do I need to upload special photos?
items.answer: No special equipment needed. Upload 6 clear photos from different angles with the guidance provided.

items.question: Do I have to download an app?
items.answer: No. The service is fully browser-based.

items.question: Can I use this on mobile?
items.answer: Yes. The platform is fully mobile-optimized.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: $150 per year.

items.question: What's included in the subscription?
items.answer: Full facial analysis and protocol, biometric scores, visualizations, aesthetic letter, annual updates, and messaging access to a real (non-AI) team.

items.question: Is it a one-time payment or subscription?
items.answer: Yearly subscription, cancel anytime.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. No contracts; cancel or pause from account settings.

items.question: Will my photos and data be kept private?
items.answer: Yes. Encrypted and stored securely; only essential staff can access photos; never shared publicly.

items.question: Is my information safe?
items.answer: Yes. Strict data protection and privacy regulations are followed.

items.question: Can I delete my account and all my data?
items.answer: Yes. Request deletion from account settings; all data is removed from servers.

items.question: Is wanting to improve your appearance toxic?
items.answer: No. Attractiveness has documented scientific benefits across employment, income, relationships, and mental health. Improving appearance is about maximizing quality of life.

items.question: Will this make me feel worse about myself?
items.answer: No. Most insecurity stems from uncertainty. The analysis gives clarity, identifies genuinely positive features, and provides a clear science-based plan — clients typically report greater confidence afterward.

items.question: Do I really need this to look better?
items.answer: Not strictly, but Qoves makes improvement faster, safer, and more effective than independent research, and likely saves time and money.

items.question: Isn't this promoting toxic beauty standards?
items.answer: No. The goal is to enhance your unique facial characteristics with natural, non-surgical, healthy-looking improvements.

items.question: I've had cosmetic procedures before — will this still work?
items.answer: Yes. Prior procedures are taken into account.

items.question: I don't want surgery — can this still help me?
items.answer: Yes. Qoves specializes in non-surgical improvements.

items.question: I live outside the US — can I still use Qoves?
items.answer: Yes. The service is 100% online and available worldwide.

items.question: I don't know anything about facial aesthetics — is that okay?
items.answer: Yes. Qoves is designed to be accessible to complete beginners.

items.question: Can I really talk to your team?
items.answer: Yes. Via the member dashboard anytime.

items.question: What if a recommendation doesn't work for me?
items.answer: Contact the team; the protocol will be adjusted with alternatives.

items.question: How can I contact Qoves if I need help?
items.answer: Through the member dashboard, email, or live chat.

items.question: Will I get support from a real person or just AI?
items.answer: Always real people.

items.question: How quickly do you respond to questions?
items.answer: Usually within 24 hours, often faster.

items.question: Can someone help me understand my results?
items.answer: Yes. The team explains results, next steps, and anything unclear.

items.question: Still unsure?
items.answer: Email inquiry@qoves.com.
